results.rendered_html:
śubhaṃyu (von 4. śubh) adj.  P. 5,2,140 . = śubhānvita Schol.  AK. 3,1,50 . = śubhasaṃyukta  H. 433 . = śubhasaṃyuta  HALĀY. 2,224 . = śaṃyu  TRIK. 3,1,24 .
1〉 Putz liebend: (marutaḥ) uṣasāṃ na ketavo 'dhvaraśriyaḥ śubhaṃyavo nāñjibhirvyaśvitan  ṚV. 10,78,7 .
— 2〉 schmuck, prächtig, schön  RAGH. 8,6 .  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 44,a,5 .  BHAṬṬ. 1,20 . saha devakumāraistairāsāṃ cakre śubhaṃyubhiḥ  PĀRŚVANĀTHAK. 4,41  (nach  AUFRECHT ).

results.rendered_html: śubhaṃyu a. [śubhaṃ asyāsti yus] Auspicious, lucky, fortunate, blessed; adhikaṃ śuśubhe śubhaṃyunā dvitayena dvyameva saṃga taṃ  R. 8. 6 ;  Bk. 1. 20.
